meaning: adj.[化](正)钨的,五价钨的,六价钨的
examples: A new type of simple and sensitive nitrite ion-selective electrode based on the special tungstic acid hollow tube has been prepared.
This paper introduces the digestion technology of mechanical activation in lieu of that of alkali boiling for manufacturing tungstic acid.
The tungstic acid catalyst was recovered by GH deposition agent, and in the meantime the intermediate product was converted to pentanedial.
